dogs.name: Rabies
dogs.description: Required by law in most regions. Protects against rabies virus.

dogs.name: Distemper (DHPP)
dogs.description: Core vaccine protecting against distemper, hepatitis, parainfluenza, and parvovirus.

dogs.name: Parvovirus
dogs.description: Critical protection against canine parvovirus, especially for puppies.

dogs.name: Bordetella (Kennel Cough)
dogs.description: Recommended for dogs in social environments like boarding or daycare.

dogs.name: Leptospirosis
dogs.description: Protects against bacterial infection spread through contaminated water.

dogs.name: Lyme Disease
dogs.description: Recommended for dogs in tick-prevalent areas.

dogs.name: Canine Influenza
dogs.description: Protects against canine flu strains H3N2 and H3N8.

cats.name: Rabies
cats.description: Required by law. Essential for all cats.

cats.name: FVRCP
cats.description: Core vaccine: feline viral rhinotracheitis, calicivirus, and panleukopenia.

cats.name: Feline Leukemia (FeLV)
cats.description: Recommended for outdoor cats or those in multi-cat households.

cats.name: Feline Immunodeficiency Virus (FIV)
cats.description: For cats at high risk of fighting with infected cats.

cats.name: Chlamydia
cats.description: Recommended for multi-cat environments with known chlamydia risk.
